headline: 10 autonomous cycles, every lane built — the whole company now reduces to 5 founder taps. Fastest first move: launch the zero-spend B2B HR lane.
source: index.html · Jun 28 cockpit board + autoloop state (cycle 10)

spotlight.title: Clear the 5 founder taps — every lane is built and waiting
spotlight.detail: The Autoloop has authored all three lanes; forward motion now reduces to five approvals, shortest-path first: (1) launch the zero-spend B2B HR lane, (2) fund + approve the Lob postcard, (3) fill the launch values once, (4) refresh the dead ATTOM key, (5) fund BatchData ~$25.

spotlight.title: Ship cinematic demo v3 + the ad-agent
spotlight.detail: Stand up the marketing ad-agent skill and cut cinematic demo v3 from the Jun 27-28 call's hybrid spec — the next brand film for orayalabs.ai, DOM scenes on audio cues.

spotlight.title: EIN fax watch → A2P submits the moment it lands
spotlight.detail: EIN re-faxed to the IRS; reply expected by return fax in ~8 business days. The instant it hits, the A2P 10DLC package submits and the SMS / outbound-call lanes open.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-faxed to the IRS; reply expected by return fax in ~8 business days. A2P 10DLC submits the moment it lands — until then SMS / outbound stay gated. Backup: SS-4 by fax for a guaranteed 4-business-day turnaround.

tasks.lead: Launch the B2B HR lane — the zero-spend first conversation
tasks.detail: No data-broker registration, no Lob funds, no TCPA exposure (it's B2B CAN-SPAM email to HR). 6 HR leaders are already researched + cited — Razon/RNDC, Myles/KBR, Boone/eBay, Russell/Cloudflare, Prabhakar/Atlassian, Withycombe/Snap. Confirm each is still in role, paste LinkedIn, reveal the work email (≤6 Apollo credits), then load the 3-touch sequence and send. Runbook: 09_b2b_hr_lane/B2B_GO_LIVE_RUNBOOK.md.

tasks.lead: Fund + approve the Lob postcard (~$50-70, 15 min)
tasks.detail: Fastest path to a first booked appointment: open + fund a Lob account and approve 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 prime leads, each carrying a QR lead_id so a booked appt traces back to this exact batch. Needs no email enrichment and carries zero TCPA risk.

tasks.lead: Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes
tasks.detail: The opt-in page, homeowner outreach and B2B HR lane share the same {{CONFIG}} tokens. One command: cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill the 20 annotated blanks (license # / NPN / business name / URLs / Retell + Jornaya ids), then python3 03_integrations/apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible.

tasks.lead: Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min)
tasks.detail: The trial key returns 401 Unauthorized. Get a new key at api.developer.attomdata.com and overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull at the top of the funnel.
Skip-traces the 77 HOF leads to append emails and switch on the cold-email lane. Token already created + tested.

Global refresh to Day 169: milestone banner, overview cockpit (new P4 Design-System card, Autoloop + 5-taps KPIs), and the Lead-Gen / Insurance / Next-Plays / Daily-Tasks cockpits rewired to current. Every prior record preserved; auto-pushed to main → Vercel.
Stand up the marketing ad-agent from the Jun 27-28 call's hybrid spec — the autonomous creative / ad lane that runs alongside the Autoloop.
Next iteration of the orayalabs.ai launch film, built from the Jun 27-28 transcript's hybrid spec — DOM scenes on audio cues, ElevenLabs VO.
Progress the personal / founder portfolio site alongside the HQ build.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name vs. legal entity; file with the operating county; publish in an adjudicated newspaper 4 consecutive weeks; bake the receipt into the A2P package.
Re-faxed to the IRS; watch for the return fax (~8 days). The moment it lands, A2P submits.
Headless claude -p driver with goals / state / guardrails on a launchd cadence (09:00 + 21:00 PT). 10 cycles run, each shipping a verified, reversible deliverable that writes back its own evidence.

TCPA opt-in landing page (07_optin_landing, 13/13 compliance markers), homeowner outreach package (08_outreach — zero-TCPA postcard + CAN-SPAM email sequence), and a Lob merge of 77/77 TIER1 leads, each with a QR for appointment attribution.

tasks.lead: Opened the B2B layoff→HR referral lane (09)
tasks.detail: The only lane that launches with zero spend / compliance gates. Researched + cited 6 senior HR leaders and pre-filled the merge CSV — turning the founder's go-live into a confirm-and-send.
One .env stamps 20 shared tokens into all three lanes; --check audits coverage and flags drift; it only ever writes local files — never sends, publishes, or deletes.

Proved it cannot run Apollo unattended, then made the contact-pull founder-executable; caught the ATTOM trial key returning 401 and corrected the source of truth. Net: every lane is built, merge-ready and compliance-checked.

tasks.lead: Twice-daily Daily Brief + dashboard / state sync
tasks.detail: This brief, plus keeping the dashboard, cofounder log and state files honest. Max-autonomy rule holds — no permission-asking on routine tasks.

done.what: Autoloop went LIVE Jun 27 — a headless claude -p driver with goals / state / guardrails on a 09:00 + 21:00 PT cadence — and has run 10 self-verifying cycles, each shipping a reversible deliverable with its own written-back evidence

Built the consumer funnel end-to-end: TCPA opt-in landing page (13/13 compliance markers), homeowner outreach package (zero-TCPA postcard + CAN-SPAM email sequence), and a Lob merge of 77/77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable to a booked appointment

Opened the B2B layoff→HR referral lane (09) — the only lane that launches with zero spend/compliance gates — and researched + cited 6 senior HR leaders (RNDC, KBR, eBay, Cloudflare, Atlassian, Snap), pre-filling the merge CSV so go-live is confirm-and-send

Built fill-once launch-config: a single .env stamps 20 shared tokens into all three lanes (--check audits coverage, writes local files only) — so one founder input unblocks the opt-in page, homeowner outreach and B2B HR lane at once

Self-policed: proved it cannot run Apollo unattended and made the contact-pull founder-executable; caught the ATTOM trial key returning 401 and corrected the source of truth. Net: every lane is built, merge-ready and compliance-checked

waiting.what: LOWEST-FRICTION first conversation (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits): launch the B2B HR lane (09_b2b_hr_lane) — no data-broker registration, no Lob funds, no TCPA. The 6 HR leaders are pre-researched + cited; confirm each is still in role, reveal the work email, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, send. Approve before sending — it reaches real HR people

FASTEST first booked appointment (~$50-70, 15 min): open + fund a Lob account and approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 prime leads, each QR-attributable. Needs no email enrichment and carries zero TCPA risk

Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes (they share the same tokens). cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill the 20 annotated blanks, then run apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible; sending / publishing still needs the approvals above

Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min) — the trial key returns 401 Unauthorized. Get a new key at api.developer.attomdata.com and overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull (top of funnel)
Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane). Token already created + tested
